description: Lock Basic Hunting & Gathering to broad Homo sapiens forager subsistence rather than a specific persistence-hunting technique or an unsourced 10,000 BCE placeholder.

checks.reason: The node uses a conservative non-placeholder by-date tied to Homo sapiens foraging evidence rather than the Ancient era default.
The foraging node is date-aligned with sourced early Homo sapiens gathering and hunting context.
Plant gathering and practical ecological knowledge are source-backed components of forager subsistence.
Stone tools are part of the simple food-procurement toolkit for this scope.
Persistence hunting is a specific hunting technique, not a direct prerequisite for broad forager subsistence.
